name: Libromancer Magigirl
name_jp: リブロマンサー・マジガール
desc: You can reveal 1 Ritual Monster in your hand: Special Summon this card from your hand. During your opponent's turn (Quick Effect): You can Ritual Summon 1 "Libromancer" Ritual Monster from your hand, by Tributing monsters from your hand or field whose total Levels equal or exceed its Level. You can only use each effect of "Libromancer Magigirl" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can reveal 1 Ritual Monster in your hand: Special Summon this card from your hand. During your opponent's turn (Quick Effect): You can Ritual Summon 1 "Libromancer" Ritual Monster from your hand, by Tributing monsters from your hand or field whose total Levels equal or exceed its Level. You can only use each effect of "Libromancer Magigirl" once per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
